debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
v : Vector α n
idx : Fin n
elt : α
f : (idx : ℕ) → α → idx < n → β
⊢ (v.set (↑idx) elt ⋯).mapFinIdx f = (v.mapFinIdx f).set (↑idx) (f (↑idx) elt ⋯) ⋯

-- Use the fact that the vector is finite and the properties of mapFinIdx and set
      calc
        (v.set (↑idx) elt).mapFinIdx f = (v.mapFinIdx f).set (↑idx) (f (↑idx) elt (by simpa using (v.set (↑idx) elt).prop)) := by
          -- Use the lemma to prove the equality
          rw [Vector.ext_iff]
          intro i
          -- Consider the cases where i is equal to idx or not
          by_cases h : (i : ℕ) = (↑idx : ℕ)
          · -- Case: i = idx
            simp_all [Vector.mapFinIdx, Vector.get_set, Vector.get_mapFinIdx]
            <;>
            (try simp_all [Fin.ext_iff]) <;>
            (try omega) <;>
            (try ring_nf) <;>
            (try aesop)
          · -- Case: i ≠ idx
            simp_all [Vector.mapFinIdx, Vector.get_set, Vector.get_mapFinIdx]
            <;>
            (try simp_all [Fin.ext_iff]) <;>
            (try omega) <;>
            (try ring_nf) <;>
            (try aesop)
        _ = (v.mapFinIdx f).set (↑idx) (f (↑idx) elt (by simpa using (v.set (↑idx) elt).prop)) := by rfl
    exact h₂
  -- Use the previously derived equality to conclude the proof
  simpa using h₁
